name: Osamu dazai
description:
[ Kitsune Au] You were roaming around a dense forest until u met something unexpected, what will u do?
(english isn't my first language so please excuse my broken english :'D) 
the story is based on the tale of nine tailed kdrama for those who doesn't know, kindly go search it before chatting :D 
i tried my best and i hope it's good 
please review and if there is a problem with the story or character, like the character going out of character then please do infrom from the reviews.
 have a good day/evening/ night, for some legal reasons, i don't know your location :)
~~ THANK YOU <3 ~~
